description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing two jobs: deploy to development and deploy to staging. Both jobs run in the deploy stage, define their own DB_NAME and DRUPAL_PATH variables, and execute the exact shell commands: sudo /opt/scripts/backup_db.sh $DB_NAME, sudo rsync -ah --delete --exclude-from=".rsync-exclude" . $DRUPAL_PATH, sudo chown -R apache:apache $DRUPAL_PATH, sudo su apache -c "drush updb -y --root=$DRUPAL_PATH", and sudo su apache -c "drush cc all --root=$DRUPAL_PATH". The deploy to development job runs only on the develop branch, sets the environment name to development with URL http://dev.siasar.org, and uses the runner tag develop with DB_NAME=drupal_development and DRUPAL_PATH=/var/www/drupal_development. The deploy to staging job runs only on the master branch, sets the environment name to staging with URL http://staging.siasar.org, and uses the runner tag staging with DB_NAME=drupal and DRUPAL_PATH=/var/www/drupal. No custom Docker image or services are defined.
